description: Mobile development profile — Android ADB and Xcode tools for mobile app development and testing

android-adb.description: Control Android devices/emulators — install APKs, run tests, capture screenshots, view logs

xcode.description: Build, run, and test iOS apps — manage simulators, run XCTest suites, capture screenshots

filesystem.description: Read and write React Native / Expo source files

fetch.description: Fetch React Native and Expo documentation

github.description: Manage mobile app repository — create release branches, upload build artifacts
